scores.correctness_notes: All core facts are correct: temp_model(), deploy(), wait() with all_active and all_agents_idle lambda, error=jubilant.any_error. Adds correct extra detail about filtering by app name and status object inspection.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.wait_timeout = 10 * 60 set as an instance attribute is suspicious — the gold standard documents timeout as a parameter to wait(), not a settable attribute on the Juju object. juju.debug_log() is also not in gold standard and may be fabricated, though it is plausible.
